title: ThreatFox connector configuration
description: Imports the abuse.ch ThreatFox recent IOC export as wm:Indicator entities.

url.title: Feed URL
url.description: URL of the ThreatFox recent-IOC JSON export (over the SSRF guard). Falls back to the pinned default feed when omitted.

limit.title: Record limit
limit.description: Optional cap on the number of indicators collected (testing / incremental runs).

auth_key.title: Auth-Key
auth_key.description: Optional abuse.ch Auth-Key (a secret; UI password field, vault-encrypted at rest), sent as the Auth-Key HTTP header. Registering a free key at auth.abuse.ch future-proofs this connector against the legacy anonymous endpoint being gated.
